description: Build QuantChat - Snapchat-like messaging app with all features including stories, snaps, disappearing messages, video/voice calls, AR filters, group chats, and deep AI integration. Requires mobile number login.
steps: Create apps/quantchat/package.json and apps/quantchat/tsconfig.json
Create apps/quantchat/api/server.ts - Express server with WebSocket support
Create apps/quantchat/api/routes/auth.ts - Phone number registration/verification, OTP, QuantMail SSO link
Create apps/quantchat/api/routes/messages.ts - Send/receive messages (text, image, video, voice, disappearing), read receipts, reactions, replies
Create apps/quantchat/api/routes/stories.ts - Post stories (photo/video), view stories, story replies, highlights, close friends
Create apps/quantchat/api/routes/snaps.ts - Send/receive snaps, snap streaks, snap map, memories
Create apps/quantchat/api/routes/calls.ts - Voice/video calls, group calls, call history, screen share
Create apps/quantchat/api/routes/groups.ts - Create/manage groups, group settings, roles, invites
Create apps/quantchat/api/routes/discover.ts - Discover content, featured stories, trending, publishers
Create apps/quantchat/api/routes/ar-filters.ts - AR filter gallery, custom filters, face tracking data
Create apps/quantchat/api/routes/ai.ts - Smart replies, message translation, content moderation, chatbot
Create apps/quantchat/api/routes/bitmoji.ts - Custom avatar creation and sharing
Create apps/quantchat/api/routes/map.ts - Snap map, friend locations, location sharing, places
Create apps/quantchat/api/controllers/ - Controllers for each route with full business logic
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/messaging-service.ts - Message delivery, encryption, offline queue
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/media-service.ts - Photo/video processing, compression, storage
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/call-service.ts - WebRTC signaling, SFU coordination
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/story-service.ts - Story creation, expiration, viewer tracking
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/ar-service.ts - AR filter processing, face detection interface
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/ai-service.ts - Smart replies, moderation, translation using packages/ai
Create apps/quantchat/api/services/notification-service.ts - Push notifications for messages/calls
Create apps/quantchat/api/middleware/ - Auth, rate limiting, content validation
Create apps/quantchat/src/types/index.ts - All QuantChat types
Create apps/quantchat/src/pages/index.tsx - Chat list (recent conversations)
Create apps/quantchat/src/pages/login.tsx - Phone number login with OTP
Create apps/quantchat/src/pages/chat/[id].tsx - Individual chat view with message input
Create apps/quantchat/src/pages/stories.tsx - Stories feed with story viewer
Create apps/quantchat/src/pages/camera.tsx - Camera with AR filters, snap capture
Create apps/quantchat/src/pages/map.tsx - Snap map with friend locations
Create apps/quantchat/src/pages/discover.tsx - Discover content feed
Create apps/quantchat/src/pages/calls.tsx - Call history and active calls
Create apps/quantchat/src/pages/profile.tsx - User profile, bitmoji, settings
Create apps/quantchat/src/components/ChatBubble.tsx - Message bubble with status indicators
Create apps/quantchat/src/components/Camera.tsx - Camera component with AR overlay
Create apps/quantchat/src/components/StoryViewer.tsx - Full-screen story viewer with progress
Create apps/quantchat/src/components/VideoCall.tsx - Video call UI with controls
Create apps/quantchat/src/components/ARFilters.tsx - AR filter selector and preview
Create apps/quantchat/src/components/SnapMap.tsx - Interactive map with friend avatars
Create apps/quantchat/src/components/MessageInput.tsx - Rich input with media/emoji/voice
Create apps/quantchat/src/components/AIAssistant.tsx - AI chat assistant overlay
Create apps/quantchat/src/services/api-client.ts - Frontend API client
Create apps/quantchat/src/services/websocket-client.ts - Real-time message handling
acceptance_criteria: Phone number authentication with OTP verification is implemented
Full messaging system (text, media, disappearing, reactions, read receipts) is functional
Stories feature (create, view, expire, highlights, close friends) is complete
Snap system (send, receive, streaks, memories) is implemented
Voice/video call infrastructure (WebRTC signaling) is in place
AR filters system with filter gallery and face tracking interface exists
Snap map with location sharing is implemented
AI integration (smart replies, translation, moderation, chatbot) is wired up
Group chat with roles and management is complete
All frontend pages and components render the full chat experience
findings: 53 TypeScript files created. TypeScript compiles cleanly (only a baseUrl deprecation warning from the root tsconfig). All routes, controllers, services, pages, and components implemented with full business logic. WebSocket manager included in server.ts for real-time messaging. The tsc build generates a tsbuildinfo file in apps/quantchat/dist/ which was committed.
